definition: a round fruit with red or green skin and crisp white flesh inside
example: She ate an apple for breakfast.

definition: to leave someone or something, usually permanently, with no intention of returning
example: They abandoned the house after the fire.

definition: the skill or power to do something
example: She has the ability to speak three languages.

definition: on the subject of; concerning
example: We talked about the weather.

definition: at or to a higher level or position than something else
example: The plane flew above the clouds.

definition: in or to a foreign country
example: She traveled abroad last summer.

definition: the state of being away from a place
example: His absence was noticed by everyone.

definition: complete, total, or not limited in any way
example: We need absolute silence during the exam.

definition: to take in or soak up a liquid or gas
example: The paper absorbed the water.

definition: existing in thought or as an idea but not having a physical or concrete form
example: Love is an abstract concept.

definition: silly, unreasonable, or ridiculous
example: That idea is completely absurd.

definition: a large or plentiful amount of something
example: The garden had an abundance of flowers.

definition: to treat someone with cruelty or violence; to use something for the wrong purpose
example: The child was abused by the guardian.

definition: relating to education and scholars, especially at a college or university
example: She excels in academic subjects.

definition: a school or institution for training in special skills or subjects
example: He attended a military academy.

definition: a distinctive way of pronouncing words characteristic of a particular region or country
example: She spoke with a French accent.

definition: to take or receive something offered; to agree to something
example: I accept your apology.

definition: the right or opportunity to use something; a way in or out of a place
example: Students have access to the library.

definition: an unexpected and unpleasant event that happens by chance
example: She was hurt in a car accident.

definition: a record of money received and spent; a description or report of something
example: I have a bank account.

definition: to claim that someone has done something illegal or wrong
example: They accused him of stealing.

definition: to make someone familiar with something by repeated exposure
example: She accustomed herself to the new routine.

definition: a continuous dull pain in a part of the body
example: I have a headache.

definition: to successfully complete or accomplish something through effort
example: She achieved her goals.

definition: a chemical substance that is sour and can burn or dissolve other substances
example: Lemon juice contains acid.

definition: to accept or admit that something is true; to recognize someone's efforts or presence
example: He acknowledged his mistake.

definition: to get or obtain something; to come to have something
example: She acquired new skills through training.

definition: a unit of land area, equal to 4,047 square meters
example: The farm covers 50 acres.

definition: to do something; to perform; to behave in a certain way
example: She acted quickly in the emergency.

definition: the process of doing something; a thing done
example: We must take action immediately.

definition: engaged in action; energetic; constantly doing something
example: She is very active in sports.

definition: the condition of being active or doing things; a pursuit or pastime
example: Physical activity is good for health.

definition: existing in reality or fact; real
example: The actual cost was higher than expected.

definition: in fact; really; in reality
example: I actually don't like that movie.

definition: sharp or severe; (of an illness) coming on suddenly and lasting a short time
example: She felt an acute pain in her leg.

definition: to change to suit new conditions or circumstances
example: Animals adapt to their environment.

definition: to put something with another thing; to combine numbers or quantities
example: Add the eggs to the mixture.

definition: the act of adding; something added
example: In addition to the main course, we had dessert.

definition: a location where someone lives or works; to speak to someone
example: What is your address?

definition: to change something slightly to make it better or suitable
example: Adjust the temperature to your preference.

definition: to respect and approve of someone or something; to look at with pleasure
example: I admire her courage.

definition: to allow someone to enter; to accept something as true
example: She admitted her mistake.

definition: to take a child legally as your own; to accept something officially
example: They adopted a baby from the orphanage.

definition: to love someone or something very much
example: She adores her grandmother.

definition: a person who is fully grown or has reached the age of maturity
example: The movie is for adults only.

definition: to move forward; to make progress; to promote
example: Technology advances every year.

definition: a condition or factor favorable to success; a benefit
example: Experience gives her an advantage.

definition: an exciting or unusual experience; a daring feat
example: They went on an adventure in the mountains.

definition: a word that modifies a verb, adjective, or another adverb
example: Quickly is an adverb in that sentence.

definition: an opponent or enemy
example: He faced his adversary in the competition.

definition: harmful or unfavorable; opposite in position or direction
example: Adverse weather conditions delayed the flight.

definition: to describe a product publicly to encourage people to buy it
example: They advertise their new product on television.

definition: guidance or suggestions about the best course of action
example: She gave me good advice about my career.

definition: to give advice to someone; to counsel
example: I advise you to study harder.

definition: to publicly recommend or support something; a person who supports a cause
example: She advocates for environmental protection.

definition: a powered flying vehicle with wings and an engine; an airplane
example: The aeroplane landed safely.

definition: an event or matter; a romantic relationship outside of marriage
example: It was a private affair.

definition: to have an influence on someone or something; to change
example: The weather affects my mood.

definition: a feeling of liking or love
example: She showed affection toward her pet.

definition: to have enough money to buy something; to be able to do something without difficulty
example: Can you afford that house?
